name: HIO Indoor Golf
about: HIO Indoor Golf features advanced SG GOLF simulators from South Korea, allowing players to experience a wide variety of international courses without travel. The venue operates on a reservation basis with a focus on privacy, offering multiple private rooms and practice bays for individual or group play. Pricing is structured by room type and hour, with options ranging from standard bays at $25 per hour to VIP rooms at $55 per hour, catering to both beginners and experienced golfers with different membership tiers available.
why_golfers_like_it: SG GOLF simulators from South Korea offer a premium and realistic playing experience
VIP rooms feature advanced Swing Plates for creating varied terrain like downhill and uphill lies
On-site practice bays with sophisticated swing analysis provide instant feedback for improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Small bites and non-alcoholic beverages are available for consumption during play
Outside alcohol is not permitted on the premises

simulator_hardware.notes: South Korean-based simulator technology with Swing Plate technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Loaner clubs are available, but you can bring your own if preferred. The venue is not responsible for damages to personal clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and beverages are not allowed in the rooms, but can be consumed in the lobby area. Outside alcohol is strictly prohibited on the premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, it takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, HIO Indoor Golf is family-friendly for all ages. Kids under 16 must be accompanied by an adult at all times and should have a basic understanding of how to swing a golf club.
